title: Backend Core: FastAPI skeleton, DB models, Alembic, Auth endpoints
description:
Реализовать ядро backend:
1. backend/app/main.py — FastAPI app factory, lifespan, middleware
2. backend/app/db/models/ — все модели: user, user_device, product, order, blog, notification, redirect, cart, telemetry
3. backend/app/api/v1/auth/ — register, login, refresh, logout
4. backend/app/api/v1/users/me — GET/PATCH/DELETE
5. Alembic initial migration (все таблицы)
6. Unit-тесты для auth service
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/auth/register — 201, user создан, email hash считан
POST /api/v1/auth/login — 200, возвращает UserResponse в поле user
alembic check — OK, alembic heads — 1 head
